description: You are a wildlife biologist analyzing a 3-minute trail camera recording at /home/ga/Videos/trapcam_raw_1080p.mp4. Based on the field notes at /home/ga/Documents/field_notes.txt, identify and process two specific events (Event A and Event B). For each event, extract the relevant time segment, crop the video to the 960x540 quadrant where the activity occurred, and slow the playback to 0.5x. Export the clips to /home/ga/Videos/processed_events/ as 'event_A_slow.mp4' and 'event_B_slow.mp4'. Document the 'original_start', 'original_end', 'crop_x', 'crop_y', 'crop_width', 'crop_height', and 'final_duration' for both events in a JSON manifest at /home/ga/Documents/processing_log.json.
